versions.version_description: Complete version,This song was Number One in the UK during 1984,then releases in the USA during 1985 and charted wellplay on acoustic or Electric Guitar with Chorus,Reverb and a little Delay effects.You Tube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BFwOs-jy53A This is the official one track starts at 1.14.

80’s pop-rock from George Michael here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Interludes play as intro. Bridge plays as verse 1 followed by verse 2 with alternate melody. Refrain plays as chorus with alternate melody. Outro plays a chorus repeating to fade with many ad-libs.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go
